MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Mar-19-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANTs GRUPO BURGES & SA DE CV's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is Granted. Plaintiffs failed to properly serve specially appearing Defendant in compliance with the methods required by the Hague Convention. Judge Kahn's order of September 18, 2012 was addressed only to defendants Adam Burgess and Lindsay Burgess, and not to this specially appearing Defendant. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

(After hearing the Court signed the order that was emailed to the court.)
